projects.title: Wheele
projects.subtitle: Peer-to-Peer (P2P) Car Rental Platform
projects.description: Designed and developed a full-stack collaborative economy platform connecting vehicle owners with renters, overseeing the entire lifecycle from database architecture to mobile UI implementation.

projects.title: Flexy
projects.subtitle: SaaS Fitness Management & Booking Platform
projects.description: End-to-end development of a "ClassPass-style" SaaS platform connecting users with multiple fitness centers. Empowers gym owners to manage operations while providing users a seamless real-time booking experience.

projects.title: MAG
projects.subtitle: Reporting & Business Intelligence Dashboard
projects.description: Built a reporting and information dashboard platform focused on KPI visibility, historical trends, and operational insights for business stakeholders.

projects.title: Blue Royale Spa
projects.subtitle: Website & Reservation System
projects.description: Developed a modern spa website with an integrated booking flow, service catalog, schedule management, and content-driven pages for marketing and conversions.

projects.title: Mouse
projects.subtitle: E-commerce Platform for Electronics
projects.description: Built an online electronics store including product catalog, cart and checkout flows, inventory administration, and order management for daily operations.

experience.description: Designing and developing automation scripts and internal microservices to streamline CI/CD workflows, implementing blue-green deployments and standardizing environment configurations for high-availability AEM environments.

Designed microservices architecture for high-traffic applications, reduced vulnerabilities with a security-first approach and Checkmarx integration, and built scalable cloud functions in GCP using Python and event-driven components (Pub/Sub).
Led migration of monolithic applications to microservices with Spring Cloud, streamlined CI/CD with Jenkins and integrated AWS services to improve scalability and reduce infrastructure costs.

Built OSGi service components for Adobe Experience Manager (AEM), delivered solutions aligned with coding standards and CI best practices, and designed GraphQL endpoints to provide flexible data retrieval.
Built full-stack web applications and RESTful APIs, optimized complex SQL queries and stored procedures in Oracle/PostgreSQL and integrated third-party services into client solutions.
